globalRules.title: Fail-Closed Design Audit
rules: Any failed validation must stop execution for the current phase run.
No silent fallback to existing UI.

globalRules.title: Phase Validation Mandatory
rules: Each phase must produce an audit output artifact.
Each phase must produce a pass/fail validation result.
Each phase must include evidence references (files, routes, components).

globalRules.title: Evidence Storage Mandatory
rules: Evidence outputs must be stored under the governed evidence root for the designaudit track.

globalRules.title: Failure Handling
rules: On any failure, generate design_failure_report.json, root_cause.md, and spec_gap_analysis.md.
On any failure, stop and require human approval before re-running.

globalRules.title: Human Approval Gate
rules: After each phase, evidence must be reviewed and explicitly approved before the next phase can run.

globalRules.title: Re-run Rules
rules: Re-run requires a spec-aligned fix, human approval, and a new run folder.
Re-run should be tracked as a new run, not overwriting previous evidence.

phases.name: Spec Ingestion & Integrity Check
phases.objective: Ensure the design spec and audit spec are valid, complete, and usable as contracts.
checks: validate presence and readability of authoritativeDesignSpec
validate presence and readability of audit spec
validate audit spec schema and phase structure

phases.name: Current Site State Extraction
phases.objective: Build a canonical deterministic snapshot of the current implementation.

phases.name: Information Architecture Conformance
phases.objective: Verify IA matches the spec-defined canonical structure and flow.

phases.name: Layout System Conformance
phases.objective: Validate page structure against the spec layout rules.
checks: landing grids used only where allowed
validation: grid not used for long-form prose

phases.name: Token & Color System Conformance
phases.objective: Verify implementation follows the spec token contract and color system rules.
checks: CSS variables map to spec aliases
semantic colors used only when meaning exists

phases.name: Typography Conformance
phases.objective: Ensure typography matches the reading-first system defined in the spec.

phases.name: Component Contract Conformance
phases.objective: Verify global and content components match the spec component contract.
checks: components page includes only allowed components

phases.name: Homepage Behavioral Conformance
phases.objective: Validate homepage is routing-first and documentation-first, not ownership-first marketing.

phases.name: Readiness Semantics Conformance
phases.objective: Ensure trust model is visible and consistent across pages.

phases.name: Accessibility & Performance Conformance
phases.objective: Validate accessibility and performance baselines with repo-local tooling only.
checks: minimal JS and no heavy animation (static checks + build)

phases.name: Conformance Summary & Decision
phases.objective: Produce final conformance decision and remediation plan from approved phase outputs.
checks: classify each area as APPLIED, PARTIAL, MISSING, or CONFLICT
validation: reports present and consistent with prior approved phases
